entries.final_answer: Hybrid (C): docs/3x/ as Charter-era hub for version-specific mental model and deep product surfaces; update main Divio sections (tutorials/, how-to/, reference/, explanation/) where users naturally enter. docs/2x/ stays as historical archive, clearly labeled. Avoids pure version-silo (B) and avoids leaving the stale 2x confusion without a clear current-era anchor (A).
options: Update main Divio sections directly (no new version section)
New docs/3x/ section parallel to docs/2x/
Hybrid: new docs/3x/ for Charter-specific + updates to main Divio sections
entries.question: Should Charter-era docs update the main Divio sections (tutorials/, how-to/, reference/, explanation/) directly, go into a new docs/3x/ section parallel to docs/2x/, or a hybrid (new 3x/ for Charter-specific content + updates to main Divio nav)?
